hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'wrangler deploy'; then echo '⚠️  After deploying worker, update WORKER_URL constant in frontend/index.html with the new worker URL.'; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'SYSTEM_PROMPT'; then echo '✓ System prompt edited. Test with: wrangler dev, then POST /audit with a test org before deploying.'; fi
